name: Banana- Apple Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream margarine in a large bowl.
2. Gradually add sugar substitute, beating at medium speed until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs and beat until thick and lemon-colored.
4. Combine flour and baking powder; add to creamed mixture, mixing well.
5. Fold in apple and banana.
6. Spoon batter into a loaf pan coated with cooking spray.
7. Bake at 350°F for 65 to 70 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Cool in pan for 10 minutes; remove from pan, and cool completely on a wire rack.
